title: Joint venture between the University of Liverpool and Pinggao Group Ltd to establish the Pinggao-Liverpool European Institute for Advanced Energy Technology: notices of Final Order and revocation
body: "The Secretary of State in the Cabinet Office has made a Final Order under the National Security and Investment Act 2021 in respect of the joint venture between the University of Liverpool and Pinggao Group Ltd to establish the Pinggao-Liverpool European Institute for Advanced Energy Technology.  On 25 November 2025, the Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster made the decision to revoke the Final Order. "
